archimate:Principle.name: 3. Support the EU CitiVERSE Vision
archimate:Principle.documentation: LDT CitiVERSE EDIC will contribute to the foundation of the EU CitiVERSE by connecting LDTs and facilitating data-sharing and AI-driven services through Multi-Country Projects (MCPs). This networked approach will enhance data fluidity and support the EU’s vision of a resilient, collaborative digital infrastructure, bolstering supply chain security by embedding digital technology within EU-led frameworks
